prompt: I need a card that shows a customer's broadband service summary — their package name, monthly cost, contract end date, and a 'Manage broadband' link. It should also show a warning if their smart hub is offline.

assertions.name: no-raw-html-layout
assertions.description: No raw <div> or <span> used as layout containers. Flex, Box, or Card from hearth-react used instead.

assertions.name: uses-card-component
assertions.description: Card (or CardContent / CardActions sub-components) is imported from @utilitywarehouse/hearth-react and used as the outer container.

assertions.name: uses-hearth-typography
assertions.description:
All text content uses Hearth typography components (Heading, BodyText, DetailText). No raw

,

-

, or for text.

assertions.name: uses-hearth-link
assertions.description: The 'Manage broadband' link uses Link or CardInteraction/CardActionLink from hearth-react. No raw <a> tag.

assertions.name: conditional-warning
assertions.description: The hub offline warning is conditionally rendered based on a prop, and uses a Hearth feedback component (Alert or similar) rather than a raw element.

assertions.name: typescript-props
assertions.description: A TypeScript interface or type is defined for the component's props, covering at minimum packageName, monthlyCost, contractEndDate, and hubOffline.

assertions.name: test-file-exists
assertions.description: A BroadbandServiceCard.test.tsx file is present and contains at least one test.
